Burglar bars and safety gate, tiled roof, tiled floors throughout the house and carpets in the bedrooms.

It is also really safe with a good neighborhood watch and an active security company. Botriver is attracting some really great new residents too.  We live here too!

This is like finding a needle in a haystack - central enough, but total privacy and peace with enough space to do nearly whatever you are dreaming to do - of course horses, plant nursery, possible coffee shop/farmstall (with consent), grower of organic vegetables, herbs, free range eggs, flowers or enjoying landscaping the area and enjoying it just for yourself and family.

descriptionHeader: Sole Mandate: Prime Land Near Birkenhead Lighthouse, Gansbaai
description:
SOLE MANDATE:
Prime Land Near Birkenhead Lighthouse, Gansbaai

Location
Nestled just outside Gansbaai, this stunning plot of land is situated near the iconic Birkenhead Lighthouse, close to the renowned Afrikanos restaurant, where visitors can enjoy unique underwater crocodile viewing. The property extends to the road leading to the lighthouse, offering a prime location with diverse development potential.

Historical Significance 
The Birkenhead/Danger Point area carries a poignant history tied to the 1852 Birkenhead shipwreck. The vessel, traveling from Ireland to South Africa, struck a submerged rock off Danger Point, carrying approximately 643 passengers. As the ship began to sink, women and children were prioritized for evacuation, similar to the Titanic disaster. Tragically, only 193 passengers survived.

Property Details
Spanning an impressive 72,579 square meters, this expansive plot is one of the largest in the Gansbaai area. Zoned for residential use, it offers the potential to develop up to eight homes, subject to the guidelines of the Danger Point Precinct Development Plan, which outlines specific regulations for multi-dwelling construction.

Features and Opportunities
This off-the-grid property in Birkenhead presents a rare opportunity for creative development, whether for a private estate or multiple residences. Its size, location, and proximity to notable landmarks make it a unique investment in a historically rich and scenic coastal region.

Activities in the area includes:
•	Shark cage diving,
•	Whale watching form a boat or from the shore,
•	Underwater crocodile watching,
•	Penguin sanctuary, 
•	Horseback riding, 
•	Hiking trials, 
•	Fishing spots,
•	4 x 4 Routes,
•	Most southern golf course (in Kleinbaai),
•	Mini-golf (put-put),

•	Sandy beaches and much more.

Call us at Gansbaai Properties for more information or to schedual a viewing.

descriptionHeader: Modern Waterfront Marvel: Embrace Off-Grid Smart Living
description:
This is a rare opportunity to own one of Fisherhaven's most breathtaking waterfront homes, 
Exclusive Sole Mandate perfectly positioned in the best location imaginable—directly opposite the Bot River Lagoon. This stunning 5-bedroom home offers magnificent panoramic views of the water and surrounding mountains, all set on an expansive 1021m² plot that is fully walled and gated to create a safe and private haven, ideal for families with children and pets.
Step inside and be greeted by a bright, airy, and immaculately presented interior. The spacious open-plan living area is designed with both comfort and entertaining in mind, featuring a built-in fireplace that subtly separates the dining and lounge spaces. Expansive stacking doors open onto a front patio with a built-in braai, providing the perfect setting to relax and watch unforgettable sunrises over the lagoon while enjoying the serene country lifestyle.
The modern kitchen is a chef’s delight, boasting a breakfast counter, a dedicated coffee station, and a generous scullery/pantry area for added convenience. Downstairs, the home offers three double bedrooms—two of which include en-suite bathrooms. Upstairs, an additional two bedrooms one of which is being used as an office and gym area, and bathroom plus a lounge that leads out onto the top balcony overlooking the lagoon and that lends itself to versatile dual living potential, whether as an entertainment hub, a rental income opportunity, or a private living space for extended family.

Externally, an established, well-manicured garden enhances the outdoor retreat, while the secure fenced perimeter ensures continuous privacy. Enhancing its modern appeal, this property features smart home technology—a standout in the area—and eco-friendly installations such as solar panels and a solar gas geyser for backup, allowing the home to operate mostly off the grid while maintaining energy efficiency. Additional conveniences include a double garage with ample storage, a spacious driveway accommodating multiple vehicles, and an extra trailer for added practicality. All alarms, cameras, and gates are remote-controlled via an app from anywhere in the world  

Situated in a vibrant community, Fisherhaven invites you to enjoy various outdoor activities, from water sports and fishing to hiking and cycling. Whether you’re drawn by the charm of the local yacht club and free boat slipway or the allure of nearby wine estates, beautiful beaches, historical landmarks, and even the occasional sighting of wild horses, this property truly embodies the ultimate coastal retreat. Blending modern comforts with the tranquillity of natural surroundings, this home exudes luxury, practicality, and charm. 
Don’t let this extraordinary opportunity slip away—schedule your viewing today and secure your slice of waterfront paradise
